title: CatSkinC
description: A simple skin mod for use in other server and make your skin can use with high resolution up to 8192x!
body:
## 🐾CatSkinC – Easy Minecraft Skin Manager  
[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Download_on-Modrinth-17BEBB?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=flat-square)](https://modrinth.com/mod/catskinc) ![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1375958)
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Join-Discord-5865F2?style=flat-square&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/PewhYEehFQ)

**Upload your own skin from inside the game and have everyone see it instantly — no server-side setup, works on any server.**

CatSkinC is a **client-side** skin mod. Press a key, drop a PNG, and your skin is uploaded to the CatSkinC cloud and pushed live to every other player running the mod. It even gives your character a **talking mouth** that moves while you speak in voice chat.

This mod is designed for players who frequently switch skins, artists who create high-detail textures, and anyone who wants more control and flexibility over their Minecraft appearance.  

---

![Upload example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93a572a2a515b73c04ad92bb3bd021e8cda8e9c4.gif)  

---

## ✨ Features

- **🎨 In-game skin upload** — press **`K`** to open the workspace, then drag-and-drop a PNG. No website, no relog.
- **🌍 Live sync for everyone** — when you change your skin, every player with the mod sees it update in real time (Server-Sent Events under the hood).
- **🗣️ Talking mouths** — add optional *mouth-open* / *mouth-close* overlay images and your skin's mouth animates while you talk in voice chat.
- **🖼️ Local library** — your uploaded skins are kept in a reusable library with thumbnails, quick re-select, and delete.
- **👤 Live 3D preview** — preview skins on a rotatable player model before you commit, with a dedicated **Slim / Wide** model toggle.
- **🧩 Plays nice with other mods** — built-in compatibility with **Figura**, plus soft integration with **Simple Voice Chat** and **Plasmo Voice**.
- **🔒 Secure by design** — identity is verified through Mojang, transfers are HTTPS-only with integrity checks, and only premium accounts can upload.

---

## 🎮 How it works

1. Install the mod on **your** client (and any friends who want to see custom skins).
2. Join any world or server.
3. Press **`K`**, drag in a PNG skin (64×64 or higher, square, power-of-two).
4. *(Optional)* Add mouth-open / mouth-close overlays for the talking effect.
5. Pick **Slim** or **Wide**, hit upload — done. Everyone running the mod sees it live.

Skin data travels through the **CatSkinC cloud**, not the Minecraft server — so the people you play with sync skins peer-to-peer regardless of what server you're on.

---

## 📦 Requirements

**This is a client-side mod — you do NOT need to install it on your Minecraft server.** Vanilla servers are fine.

| | Required |
|---|---|
| [**Fabric API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) | ✅ Yes |
| [**Architectury API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) | ✅ Yes |
| **Account** | Premium / Mojang account (offline/cracked uploads are rejected) |

### Supported versions & loaders

| Minecraft | Loaders |
|---|---|
| **1.21.1** | Fabric, NeoForge |
| **1.20.1** | Fabric, Forge |

> Players without the mod simply see you with your normal vanilla skin — nothing breaks for them.

---

## 🔌 Optional integrations (install only if you want them)

- [**Simple Voice Chat**](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) / [**Plasmo Voice**](https://modrinth.com/plugin/plasmo-voice) — drives the talking-mouth animation from your real voice activity.
- [**Figura**](https://modrinth.com/mod/figura) — fully compatible. If you have an active Figura avatar, CatSkinC steps aside and lets Figura render your character, so the two never fight over your skin.
- [**Emotecraft**](https://modrinth.com/plugin/emotecraft) — detected and supported alongside emotes.

All of these are **soft dependencies**: if they aren't installed, CatSkinC just runs without those features.

---

## ❓ FAQ

**Do I need this on the server?**
No. It's purely client-side. Install it on each player's game.

**Will players without the mod see my skin?**
No — they'll see your default vanilla skin. Only players with CatSkinC installed see custom skins.

**Does it work with shaders / Figura / voice mods?**
Yes. Figura takes priority when you have an avatar loaded, and voice mods power the mouth animation.

**My skin won't upload?**
Make sure you're on a premium (paid) Minecraft account and your image is a square PNG sized to a power of two (64, 128, 256, …).

---

## 🔧Compatibility  

- **Minecraft:** Java Edition (tested on 1.20.x & 1.21.x)  
- **Loaders:** Fabric,Forge,NeoForge
- **Environment:** Client-side only  

---

## ℹ️Notes

- Skin data is managed via **Cloud** (stored and retrieved online)  
- Client-only mod, no server-side installation required  
- One player = one skin file  

---

## Community & Development  

CatSkinC is community-friendly and open source. You can:  
- community on  **[Discord](https://discord.com/invite/PewhYEehFQ)**  
- Report bugs or request features on  **[GitHub Issues](https://github.com/catlab-design/CatSkinC/issues)**  
- Explore or contribute at the  **[GitHub Repository](https://github.com/catlab-design/CatSkinC)**
